posts.raw_content:
It is an enormous red flag to see a Republican politician get endorsed by Democrats. The only reason they'd ever endorse a Republican is if they know that particular Republican would benefit them in their quest for power, to which at that point that Republican would definitely NOT be "America First".

Yet some people on the right STILL tout this guy as being so principled and conservative, and are seemingly dismissive of the fact that he's getting endorsements from a lot of the wrong people.

...All because he's not "funded by AIPAC" or some shit.

Israel Derangement Syndrome exists and it's becoming the right's version of Trump Derangement Syndrome.

I personally do not give a shit about Israel, so don't come me with some retarded "Did Israel pay you to say this? Wall kisser!" bullshit. I think it's clear that people who blame Israel for everything have fallen for a massive psyop. Wouldn't surprise me if this psyop was created by the deep state to divide the right and get many of Trump's voters to turn against him. It feels uncannily similar to the "Russia Russia Russia" bullshit pushed by the legacy media. Trump gets accused of being Netanyahu's puppet, just like the left falsely accused him of being Putin's puppet.

It's downright absurd that people will support someone just for simply opposing Israel, and this includes literal fucking communists and muslims. I've seen people ON THE RIGHT literally praising ZOHRAN MAMDANI just because he's not a jew and he opposes Israel. This is part of the reason why Israel Derangement Syndrome feels so real. Imagine hating Israel so much that it causes you to start shilling for muslims, what a fucking joke.

And don't even get me started on the "the right and the left should unite against Israel!!!" retardation, that's just utterly laughable. Why the fuck would I want to unite with people who shamelessly celebrated Charlie Kirk getting assassinated?
posts.author: TheJakeFroggy
posts.title: If Thomas Massie is actually genuinely "America First" like some people tout him to be, then he wouldn't be getting endorsements from Democrats. But he is, and thus it's really suspicious.
